[103:03]We talk about Tucker Carlson. You bring the receipts. His dad ran Voice of America

[103:09]for the CIA, then was at the foundation for defensive democracies, which is the most pro-Israel think tank in DC. That's evidence.

[103:19]That's a receipt. That's proof.

[103:22]It's there. It's public record. It's, it's there. These associations

[103:29]These events, these are things that are documented, that's proof, but to say, hmm, we found a

[103:34]clerical error in this public filing from 40 years ago and such and such a thing, Sigmund

[103:40]Freud and this, that and the other project looking glass, that's not evidence.

[103:45]And this is what I was getting at throughout the year.

[104:01]It's being generated as though it's a serialized true crime soap opera, when in reality,

[104:11]Well, what it should be is it should deal in reality, it should deal with facts, it

[104:24]conspiracy, then in a conspiracy theory as well.

[104:48]It has reached this point of I think just total exuberance

[104:56]I thought that was very admirable

[104:57]and I think it speaks very highly of his character.
